name: TUSQ Ludwieg tube — UNSW Config A (Ramp-1018) conditions
description: Static tunnel conditions and the source-constrained Ramp-1018 reconstruction used for the Config-A research anchor.
source: Bhattrai, McQuellin, Currao, Neely, Buttsworth, J. Propulsion and Power 38(1), 2022, doi:10.2514/1.B38348; UNSW High-Speed FSI Database Case 05-2020; Bhattrai PhD thesis.
status: Geometry is source_reconstructed_v1, not exact CAD and not experiment calibrated. The solver freestream retains the verified static case-sheet values.

nominal_stagnation_variants.usage: Provenance note only; these variants do not replace the verified static p_inf=755 Pa and T_inf=75 K solver inputs.

geometry.coordinate_rebase: solver x=0 at ramp leading edge
geometry.physical_model: Ramp-1018 leading-edge incidence 8.33 deg, total turn 18.51 deg, 3 mm Al 6061-T6 cantilever
geometry.claim_limit: Trend-level low-fidelity and code-to-code work. Exact experiment matching requires the original UNSW CAD/50-node coordinates.

motion.normalization: unit leading-edge gap increase; zero displacement and slope at support; zero downstream
